name: Death by Chocolate Truffle Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 stick butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is easy to make and impresses with its rich chocolate flavor. For a variation, try making Kahlua whipped cream instead of the espresso sauce (recipe provided below).
1. Prepare the Chocolate Wafer Crust: Crush or grind fine chocolate wafers in a food processor or put them in a ziploc bag and crush with a rolling pin. Melt butter and blend it into the crumbs. Press into a tart pan (9-inch) and chill until firm (about 1 hour). Alternatively, bake at 300°F for 15 minutes, cool, then fill.
2. Preparing the Filling: In a medium saucepan, combine chocolate, cream, butter, and Kahlua. Heat over moderately low heat, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat and let cool for 30 minutes. Pour into the cooled tart shell and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
3. Sauce Preparation: In a saucepan, combine cream, sugar, and butter. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently, until it boils. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat, stir in espresso grounds, and serve warm sauce drizzled over the tart with whipped cream on top.
Kahlua Whipped Cream: Whip cream until soft peaks form, then gradually add powdered sugar while beating. Gradually drizzle in Kahlua while continuing to beat until desired consistency is achieved.
